get.summary: Convert HTML page to PDF document

parameters.name: Properties.Orientation
parameters.description:
Orientation of pages of a PDF file.
            Default value: Portrait

parameters.name: Properties.PrintBackground
parameters.description:
Define print background of a page or not.
            Default value: true

parameters.name: Properties.HeaderHTML
parameters.description:
HTML code which will be inserted in header of pages.
            Default value: null

parameters.name: Properties.FooterHTML
parameters.description:
HTML code which will be inserted in footer of pages.
            Default value: null

parameters.name: OutputType
parameters.description:
Type in which you want to get result of extracting (optional). Default value: Content. 
            IMPORTANT: 
            Link type generates public unique link to download, file is removed after default StorageTime(see File API). 
            LinkPrivate generates private unique link which should NOT be shared as it can be accessed with your api key only!

get.description: Convert HTML page to PDF document

post.summary: Convert HTML page to PDF document
post.description: Convert HTML page to PDF document

parameters.name: Properties.StartPageIndex
parameters.description:
Index of page (zero-based) of PDF file from which data will be extracted.
            Default value: all pages

parameters.name: Properties.EndPageIndex
parameters.description:
Index of a page (zero-based) on which extracting of data will be finished.
            Default value: all pages

parameters.name: Properties.PreserveFormattingOnTextExtraction
parameters.description:
Value indicating whether to preserve the text formatting on the extraction.
            Default value: True

parameters.name: Properties.DetectNewColumnBySpacesRatio
parameters.description:
Space ratio between words.
            Default value: 1

parameters.name: Properties.OcrCacheMode
parameters.description:
Recognize text on embedded images using Optical Character Recognition (OCR). Set the language using OCRLanguage property.
            Default value: Off

parameters.name: OutputType
parameters.description:
Type in which you want to get result of extracting (optional). Default value: Content. 
            IMPORTANT: 
            Link type generates public unique link to download, file is removed after default StorageTime(see File API). 
            LinkPrivate generates private unique link which should NOT be shared as it can be accessed with your api key only!

parameters.description: Index of a page (zero-based) on which generating of images will be finished (for RasterOutputFormat is TIFF).

parameters.description:
Defines TIFF image compression. (for RasterOutputFormat is TIFF).
            Default value: JPEG

parameters.name: Properties.PageIndex
parameters.description:
Index of a page (zero-based) from which image will be generated (for RasterOutputFormat is not TIFF).
            Default value: 0 (first page)

parameters.name: Properties.RasterOutputFormat
parameters.description:
File format in which page of PDF file will be generated.
            Default value: PNG file

parameters.name: OutputType
parameters.description:
Type in which you want to get result of extracting (optional). Default value: Content. 
            IMPORTANT: 
            Link type generates public unique link to download, file is removed after default StorageTime(see File API). 
            LinkPrivate generates private unique link which should NOT be shared as it can be accessed with your api key only!
